items.title: Mali army says armed groups launch coordinated attacks across country
items.summary: Witnesses report explosions and sustained gunfire near a military base outside the capital, Bamako.

items.title: Summer rain likely in Kerala from April 27; yellow alert for four districts
items.summary: The summer rain will gain strength in the State from April 27, and the meteorological agency issued a yellow alert warning of rains in the range of 64.4 mm-115.5 mm in 24 hours...
